title: Board of Directors
content:
Nordregio brings a distinct Nordic comparative perspective to Arctic research and policy development. We collaborate with public authorities and local stakeholders to address critical issues such as climate adaptation and climate change impacts on socio-ecological systems. Our comprehensive data collection supports informed policymaking, while active engagement with indigenous communities ensures inclusive and co-designed research. These efforts contribute to our assessments of changes in ecosystem services, and governance of natural resources. Through this work, Nordregio equips policymakers with the necessary tools and knowledge to make informed decisions that ensure sustainable development and resilience in the Arctic region.

Member for Denmark (chairman)
Kasper Lykke Kirkelund Søndergaard
Danish Housing and Planning Authority
kasson@plst.dk

Sara Aasted Paarup, Vicedirektør (Deputy Member)
Plan – og Landdistriktsstyrelsen
sarpaa@bpst.dk

Member for Norway
Erik Vieth Pedersen, Director-General
Ministry of Local Governments and Regional Development
evp@kdd.dep.no

Ronny Kristiansen (Deputy Member)
Department of regional policy, KDD
